Row.Text: A toolkit of multiplayer quality-of-life features for Civilization VII. Its first tool is a fully synchronized pause: any player can pause; the host (or a timed vote) resumes. It adds Pause / Ready / View Map controls to the built-in pause menu, keeps the game paused through an "UNPAUSING..." countdown, blocks game-advancing input while paused, and pauses on a player disconnect before the AI can take over.
